title: Eva Fan made Manga Translated
wikitext:
[]: Eva Fan-made Manga Translated =)             Quote Post by iihieiii » Sun Jun 09, 2013 10:43 am Sup guys... u remember that guy who makes some Japanese k"ick-ass" mangas from Eva Q...yeah....he just translated his recent work to english ( since i was annoying her for 3 days lol) Guys...this guy don't even speak english...he also make a friend translate for him...even with a "bad english "is understandable... look at the bright side...we may never even understand what the comics were saying without the translation ;P so stop bitching =) Enjoy SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Rena » Sun Jun 09, 2013 5:21 pm So you harrassed someone so they would make a translation? Someone that doesn't even know English? For three days?

[]:             Quote Post by iihieiii » Sun Jun 09, 2013 5:29 pm LOL nah...just sent him 3 msg's in this 3 days....but like i said...a friend translate things for him but at the time i didn't know that

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jun 09, 2013 6:01 pm I hope you thoroughly thanked him for making an attempt at translation that quickly.

[]:             Quote Post by iihieiii » Sun Jun 09, 2013 6:19 pm ElMariachi wrote: I hope you thoroughly thanked him for making an attempt at translation that quickly.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Jun 10, 2013 3:58 pm If his translation interest is ever piqued again, tell him that there are a ton of things that need translating around here.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jun 10, 2013 5:08 pm Good translation, even if it did result in such memorable lines like "Today is a beautiful night."
